auth.invalid_token: Session expired, please log in again

saml.not_enabled: SAML single sign-on is not enabled
saml.misconfigured: SAML configuration is incomplete or invalid
saml.missing_email: SAML response is missing the email attribute
saml.jit_disabled: No matching user was found and JIT provisioning is disabled
saml.default_company_required: A default company must be configured before enabling SAML JIT provisioning
saml.default_department_not_found: Configured SAML default department was not found
saml.default_role_invalid: Configured SAML default role is invalid
saml.company_code_not_found: The specified company code does not exist or is disabled
saml.department_code_not_found: The specified department code does not exist or is disabled
saml.group_mapping_invalid: Configured SAML group mapping is invalid
saml.missing_external_id: SAML response is missing the external identity

pr.cannot_submit_non_draft: Only draft status can be submitted
pr.cannot_decide_non_submitted: Only submitted status can be reviewed
pr.already_converted: This requisition has already been converted to a PO
pr.no_items: Please add at least one line item
pr.must_be_approved_to_convert: Only approved requisitions can be converted to a PO

contract.not_editable_in_status: Contract cannot be edited in its current status
contract.cannot_delete_with_paid_schedul: Contract has paid payment records and cannot be deleted
contract.number_required: Contract number must not be empty
contract.number_duplicate: Contract number is already in use
template.file_missing_on_disk: Template file is missing on server, please re-upload
template.supplier_missing: Supplier information missing, cannot generate document
template.contract_required_for_generatio: Document generation requires a contract, but this PO has none
po_contract_link.not_found: No link exists between this PO and contract
po_contract_link.cannot_unlink_primary: Cannot unlink the primary PO from this contract
po_contract_link.cannot_remove_last: Cannot unlink: this is the contract's last PO association
po_contract_link.has_payments: Cannot unlink: this PO already has payment records referencing this contract
po_contract_link.supplier_mismatch: Cannot link PO and contract with different suppliers
po_contract_link.company_mismatch: Cannot link PO and contract from different companies
po_contract_link.currency_mismatch: Cannot link PO and contract with different currencies
payment.contract_required: Payment must be associated with a contract
payment.contract_po_mismatch: Selected contract does not belong to this purchase order
payment.schedule_parent_mismatch: Schedule item does not belong to the selected contract/PO
payment.schedule_requires_primary_po: Contract schedule payments must be recorded against the contract's primary PO
payment.cannot_delete_confirmed: Confirmed payments cannot be deleted — reverse first
schedule_item.cannot_delete_paid: Cannot delete a paid schedule item
schedule_item.already_paid: This installment has already been paid
user.cannot_delete_self: You cannot delete your own account
user.cannot_delete_last_admin: Cannot delete the last active admin
user.has_references: This user is referenced by existing records (PR/PO/approvals/audit logs) and cannot be hard-deleted. Disable the account instead.

feishu.not_configured: Feishu app is not configured, please set App ID and App Secret first

test.user_not_found: Current user not found in Feishu
test.no_open_id: Current user has no open_id in Feishu

feishu.not_configured: Feishu App ID or App Secret is not configured
feishu.token_failed: Failed to obtain Feishu access token

test.user_not_found: Current admin account not found in Feishu

delivery_plan.invalid_qty: Planned quantity must be greater than 0
delivery_plan.missing_po_or_contract: Delivery plan must be linked to a PO or contract
delivery_plan.already_complete: Delivery plan is complete and cannot be modified
